stock_market.summary: Markets are exhibiting cautious optimism as U.S. stock futures show an upward trend following earlier volatility. Geopolitical tensions in the Middle East, particularly regarding Iran and shipping routes, remain the primary driver of uncertainty. S&P 500 faces potential correction risks but analysts remain watchful of earnings resilience.

art_market.summary: The art market shows a cautiously optimistic recovery trend. Global market expanded by 4% in 2025, with U.S. auction sales notably increasing by 23% year-over-year. Focus remains on high-quality, provenance-backed works.
